meta.title: Pronto — The path that makes the wait magical
meta.description: Create a personalised countdown path your child fills with stickers every day until the big event arrives. Instant PDF download or printed kit shipped across Australia.

hero.subtitle: A personalised countdown path your child paints, then fills with one sticker a day, until the big moment arrives.

home.moment_h2: Anticipation is its own kind of magic
home.moment_body1: Kids live in the present. Big events, like a new baby, a birthday or Christmas, feel impossibly far away. Abstract. 'Soon' means nothing to a four-year-old.
home.moment_body2: But give them something to do about it. Every morning they add a sticker to their path. Suddenly, the wait has a shape. And your child is part of the story.
home.moment_pull: "She woke up asking if she could add her sticker today."
home.uses_h2: What are you counting down to?
home.uses_subtitle: Any big moment becomes an adventure with the right countdown.
home.how_step1_body: Pick a character, theme, and destination. Type the title. See it live.
home.how_step2_body: Download the PDF instantly, or have it printed and shipped to your door.
home.how_step3_body: Colour the path together, then add one sticker each day as the big moment gets closer.
home.kit_body: The printed kit ships locally in Australia — a large premium poster, a matching 30-sticker sheet, plus your PDF digital included so you can start right away while you wait.
home.proof_h2: They said it. We just printed it.
home.proof_1_quote: My son added his first sticker before breakfast. He's never been so excited to wake up.
home.proof_2_quote: We used it for the new baby. My daughter checked it every single morning. Absolutely perfect.
home.proof_3_quote: Easiest thing I've done that made the biggest impact. Worth every cent.
home.pricing_subtitle: Both include the same personalised path, just delivered differently.
home.pricing_digital_desc: Download instantly. Print at home or at any print shop.
home.pricing_kit_desc: Large poster + 30 stickers + PDF digital included. Printed locally, shipped to your door.
home.cta_h2: Your child's next big wait starts today.
home.cta_subtitle: 3 minutes to make. Weeks of magic.

about.h1: Made by a mum, for the wait
about.body1: Hi, I'm Patti. I'm a mum of two girls, a big believer in preparing them mentally for life's big changes, and that's exactly how these paths were born.
about.body2: During my maternity leave, my days were filled with nappies, cuddles, sleepless nights, and a growing desire to be fully present with my little ones. Around that time, I also started sharing our journey on Instagram, not because I had all the answers, but because I wanted to document the way I see motherhood and the way I see my daughters.
about.body3: I often think about the adults they're becoming. The kind of women I'd hope to meet one day as strangers: kind, confident, curious, and deeply connected to themselves.
about.body4: When I was pregnant with my second daughter, Simona, we decided not to find out the baby's sex.
about.pull1: While the surprise was exciting, it also meant there were many things we couldn't prepare for. So I focused on the things we could.
about.body5: One of those things was helping my eldest daughter, Bruna, get ready to become a big sister. We talked often about the day Mum and Dad would go to the hospital and come back home with a new baby.
about.pull2_l1: One day, Bruna asked me: 'Is that happening now?'
about.pull2_l3: But what does three months mean to a three-year-old?
about.body6: That's when the idea came to me. I created a simple path with 60 steps. Every day, Bruna would add a sticker to a new step as she made her way toward meeting her baby sister.
about.body7: Suddenly, time wasn't an abstract concept anymore. She could see it. Follow it. Celebrate it.
about.body8: What started as a way to prepare one little girl for a big life change became something much bigger. These paths are designed to help children understand waiting, navigate change, and feel part of the journey. Whether they're counting down to a new sibling, a birthday, a holiday, a move, or any special milestone, the path gives meaning to the days in between.
about.pull3_l1: Because sometimes the waiting feels just as important as the destination.
about.pull3_l2: And every little step deserves to be celebrated.
about.cta_h2: Ready to make the wait magical?

howitworks.h1: From idea to hands in under 3 minutes
howitworks.step1_body: Open the editor and personalise your title, character, and theme. See it update live as you go — what you see is exactly what you get.
howitworks.step2_body: Want it right now? Download the PDF and print at home or at your local print shop. Want the full experience? Order the Physical Kit: A3 premium print plus a 30-sticker sheet. We'll have it on your doorstep in 2–4 days.
howitworks.step3_body: Colour the path together, then add one sticker each day as the big moment gets closer. Hang it somewhere your child sees it every morning. The fridge is perfect.
howitworks.step4_body: No more 'how many more days?' meltdowns. No more abstract calendar counting. Just one sticker a day, and a child who feels like they're part of the story.
howitworks.faq_1_a: Pronto works best for children aged 3–10. Old enough to understand counting down, young enough that the ritual is genuinely magical. That said, we've had parents tell us their 12-year-olds asked for one too.
howitworks.faq_2_q: Can I print the PDF at home?
howitworks.faq_2_a: Absolutely. The PDF is high-resolution and designed for A3 or A4 printing. A3 gives more room for colouring. Most print shops (Officeworks, Kmart Photo, local printers) can print A3 for a few dollars.
howitworks.faq_3_q: How long does the kit take to arrive?
howitworks.faq_3_a: 2–4 business days across Australia. We print locally via Printful's Australian print partners, so there are no international shipping delays. You'll receive a tracking number by email once dispatched.
howitworks.faq_4_q: Can I preview the path before buying?
howitworks.faq_4_a: Yes, the editor shows a live preview of your exact path. You'll see every change in real time. No surprises at checkout.
howitworks.faq_5_q: What if I made a mistake in my design?
howitworks.faq_5_a: For PDF downloads, just go back to the editor, fix it, and download again. You only need to pay once. For the Physical Kit, email us at hola@maspronto.com and we'll do our best to help.
howitworks.faq_6_a: Not yet. The Physical Kit is Australia-only for now. The PDF download is available worldwide.
howitworks.mid_cta: Ready to give it a try?

whythisworks.intro: It's not just a pretty poster. There's real psychology behind why children respond so powerfully to a countdown path.
whythisworks.card1_body: Kids under 7 experience time differently. 'Three months' is meaningless. 'Soon' is an empty word. Without something concrete to hold onto, the wait feels infinite — and that's when the anxiety and the endless 'are we there yet?' begins.
whythisworks.card2_body: When children know what to expect — one sticker, every morning — they stop asking 'when is it?' The ritual replaces uncertainty with routine. And routine is where children feel safe.
whythisworks.card3_body: Abstract calendars don't mean much to little ones. But a path they can touch, fill in, and watch grow shorter? That's something they can understand. Progress becomes visible. The wait has a shape.
whythisworks.card4_title: They become part of the story
whythisworks.card4_body: Children who feel like participants — not just passengers — handle change and anticipation far better. Adding that sticker every day gives them agency. They're not just waiting. They're doing something about it.
whythisworks.closing_p2: . Turning the wait into something your child can hold, touch, and celebrate — one step at a time.
whythisworks.cta_h2: Ready to make the wait magical?

returns.title: Returns Policy
returns.s1_p: Due to the nature of digital downloads, we do not offer refunds on PDF purchases once the file has been delivered. If you experience a technical issue downloading your file, contact us within 48 hours and we will resend it.
returns.s2_intro: Your rights under the Australian Consumer Law (ACL) apply in full. We will offer a replacement or full refund if:
returns.s2_li1: The product arrives damaged or defective
returns.s2_li3: The item does not match its description
returns.s2_p2: To request a return, contact hola@maspronto.com within 7 days of receiving your order with a photo of the issue. We will cover return shipping for faulty items.
returns.s2_p3: We do not accept returns for change of mind on personalised products, as each kit is made to order specifically for you.
returns.s3_p: Approved refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to your original payment method.
